title: Software Engineer (Fresher)
description:
**Company Description** 
 Rizen Labs is a go\\-to\\-market and content partner that helps startups scale through strong design and distribution. The team collaborates closely with YC and a16z\\-backed founders to revamp UI/UX for higher conversion and build end\\-to\\-end content engines across short\\-form, long\\-form, LinkedIn, and ads. Rizen Labs also manages social media and performance marketing to support consistent growth. The company focuses on turning audience attention into a qualified pipeline, offering an environment where technology, design, and content strategy come together to drive measurable impact for fast\\-growing startups.
 



  





**Role Description** 
 As a Software Engineer (Fresher) at Rizen Labs, you will work as part of a small, agile team to design, build, and maintain backend services and internal tools that power our GTM and content operations. In this full\\-time remote role, you will implement features, fix bugs, write clean and testable code, and participate in code reviews under the guidance of senior engineers. You will collaborate with designers, content strategists, and marketing specialists to integrate software solutions with internal dashboards, content pipelines, and analytics systems. On a typical day, you will translate product requirements into technical tasks, contribute to API development, work with databases, and improve system performance and reliability. You will also be encouraged to learn new technologies, follow best practices, and document your work for future reuse and collaboration.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Strong foundational knowledge in Computer Science principles, including data structures, algorithms, and basic software engineering concepts.
* Proficiency in Programming and Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP), with experience in at least one modern language (e.g., Python, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Go).
* Understanding of Software Development practices, including version control (Git), testing, debugging, and documentation.
* Basic experience or coursework in Back\\-End Web Development, including APIs, databases, and server\\-side frameworks.
* Bachelor’s degree (or final\\-year student) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment, manage time effectively, and collaborate asynchronously with global team members.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and willingness to learn from feedback and mentorship.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure), CI/CD, or basic DevOps concepts is a plus.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 




 OPSERA is a modern technology consultancy that empowers enterprises to build secure, scalable, and cloud\\-native platforms. We specialize in Platform Engineering, Cloud Transformation, DevSecOps, and AI\\-driven automation, enabling organizations to innovate confidently across leading cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, GCP, and more. With extensive experience across diverse industries such as banking, government, and telecom, we deliver measurable outcomes, enhanced productivity, and future\\-ready solutions. At OPSERA, we focus on transforming complex challenges into resilient, secure platforms while fostering lasting internal capabilities in our client organizations.

 This is a full\\-time remote role for a Software Engineer. As a Software Engineer, you will design, develop, and maintain robust software applications, focusing on backend web development and programming. You will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to create scalable and efficient solutions, perform code reviews, troubleshoot issues, and deliver high\\-quality, secure, and maintainable code.

title: Senior Software Engineer, AI Agents
description:
**About Asha Health** 




 Asha Health helps medical practices launch their own AI clinics. We're backed by Y Combinator, General Catalyst, 186 Ventures, Reach Capital and many more. We recently raised an oversubscribed seed round from some of the best investors in Silicon Valley. Our team includes AI product leaders from companies like Google, physician executives from major health systems, and more.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We're looking for a top 0\\.01% Software Engineer to join our engineering team in our Bangalore office.
 



  





 4\\.6 fundamentally changed the game, which means that high intelligence, high agency engineers can now do the work of 10\\+ good engineers. It doesn't make sense to have anyone but the best on the team.
 



  





**Since low level coding has become easier, what we expect from engineers on our team has expanded. Engineers on our team are expected to:** 



* Ship features end to end at a rapid pace
* Deeply research the domain and be their own product managers
* Ensure reliability and quality is best\\-in\\-class
* Design robust eng architecture, and develop testing and observability tools for each feature pre\\-launch
* Build each feature with deep customer empathy, meaning planning out and building stellar UX yourself



  





**This means to thrive in a startup environment like ours, you not only need to be a stellar engineer, but you need to:** 



1. Be super adept with AI development tools and building the AI systems that build your features for you (Conductor, Browser agents, QA agents, Ralph loops, adverserial agents, and more).
2. Have exceptional product and UX taste, meaning you can ship features that are more effective than those historically designed by teams of product managers and designers.
3. Take the highest level of ownership around feature outcomes, reliability, and observability.



  





**Other Points to Note** 



1. We are growing rapidly, our work has impact on tens of thousands of patients if not more.
2. On our team, everything you do is on the bleeding edge of applied AI.
3. We expect a high level of commitment from everyone on the team, most folks work 6 days and lead every project with intensity. It's a high ask, and we only bring on the best people. We compensate significantly above market, accordingly.



  





**Compensation** 




 100 LPA\\+

title: Senior Software Engineer I
description:
Optum is a global organization that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on the communities we serve as you help us advance health optimization on a global scale. Join us to start
 **Caring. Connecting. Growing together.**
**Primary Responsibilities**
* Plan, define, design, implement and maintain the solution architecture in the area of internal and external identity \\& access management solution in public and private cloud environments
* Design \\- Architect \\- Automate \\- Enhance \\-\\> AWS Infrastructure using Terraform and other provisioning tools
* Lead \\-\\> AWS Infrastructure Architecture function
* Provide end\\-to\\-end support and leadership of multiple platforms
* Continuous application monitoring \\& Alerting using modern advanced monitoring \\& log forwarding tools such as Elastic Search, Splunk, Datadog, Elastic APM, Prometheus, Grafana etc.
* Frequent/continuous zero downtime deployment planning and executions
* Passion for building scalable, global, complex systems to solve problems with proven ability to deliver high quality software
* Develop and integrate analytics algorithms using AI and machine learning in largescale environments
* Keep yourself up to date on the security aspects of the products, including infrastructure security, application security and cloud security
* Work with the product management and Designers and convert their vision into a technical solution
* Be flexible to work with global teams and working on different time zones
* Be able to work in a fast\\-paced environment where continuous innovation
* Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or re\\-assignment to different work locations, change in teams and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to the changing business environment). The Company may adopt, vary or rescind these policies and directives in its absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or otherwise) on its ability to do so


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent
* 9\\+ years of experience in Software Engineering
* Experience on AWS and Terraform for designing and building distributed and reliable systems
* Experience planning and supporting \\+99\\.999% availability against critical applications in production
* Proven skilled in: AWS, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, ISTIO, Helm, Java, Springbot, REST API, Jenkins, Groovy , Harness, Github Actions, Git, Shell, Python, Go, SQL


*At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live healthier lives and make the health system work better for everyone. We believe everyone\\-of every race, gender, sexuality, age, location and income\\-deserves the opportunity to live their healthiest life. Today, however, there are still far too many barriers to good health which are disproportionately experienced by people of color, historically marginalized groups and those with lower incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes \\- an enterprise priority reflected in our mission.*
